priorities.title: Reduce ACWR below 1.3

priorities.title: Recover Lateral Raise
priorities.reason: Lateral Raise has regressed by 25% from 10.0 to 7.5 kg over 8 sessions.

priorities.title: Recover Straight Arm Lat Pulldown

risks.title: Injury risk
risks.detail: The acute load of 1939.3 kg exceeds the chronic load of 1132.9 kg, indicating a potential injury risk zone.

wins.title: Consistency streak
